home.heroTitle: Inspiring trust, building hope, and funding lasting change.
home.heroCopy: HeartFeel Foundation connects donors and volunteers to programs that support education, health, food security, and local leadership through transparent fundraising and measurable results.

programs.title: Youth Education Support
programs.description: Scholarships, after-school learning labs, and digital skills training for underserved youth.

programs.title: Food Security Initiatives
programs.description: Community gardens, emergency food distributions, and nutrition workshops for families in need.

programs.title: Health & Wellness Outreach
programs.description: Mobile clinics, mental health counseling, and vaccination drives to strengthen local care.

programs.title: Women's Empowerment
programs.description: Entrepreneurship coaching, savings groups, and leadership development for women.

successStories.quote: From school dropouts to scholarship recipients, our learning lab has restarted 120 dreams.
successStories.author: Amina, Program Coordinator

successStories.quote: A community garden now supports 150 families every month with fresh produce and nutrition education.
successStories.author: Samuel, Local Partner

testimonials.quote: HeartFeel made me feel seen and supported during a time when resources were scarce.
testimonials.name: Grace N.

testimonials.quote: The transparency reports made it easy to trust where donations were going.
testimonials.name: Michael T.

bottomCards.title: Donor trust and transparency
bottomCards.description: We publish financial transparency reports and program budgets so supporters can see exactly how donations are spent.

bottomCards.title: Volunteer leadership
bottomCards.description: Volunteers play a central role in our outreach, training, and care programs. Every opportunity is designed with safety and community partnership in mind.

about.heroTitle: Building trust through transparency and meaningful impact.
about.heroCopy: Our mission is to deliver compassionate support and measurable outcomes through inclusive programs, fundraising integrity, and community partnership.

cards.subtitle: Mission & Values
cards.title: We invest in projects that lift lives and strengthen local capacity.
cards.description: Our core values are accountability, empathy, equity, and sustainability. Every program is guided by community priorities and long-term outcomes.

cards.subtitle: Financial Transparency
cards.title: Open reporting for every donor and partner.
cards.description: We publish quarterly financial reports, program budgets, and impact statements so supporters always know how contributions are used.

cards.subtitle: Partnership Model
cards.title: Collaborating with local leaders and global donors.
cards.description: Our work is grounded in local partnership, public agency support, and donor alignment to ensure every intervention is sustainable and relevant.

whatWeDo.title: Delivering relief, opportunity, and accountable stewardship.
items: Provide urgent relief through food, healthcare, and shelter programs.
Develop long-term education, livelihood, and empowerment initiatives.
Support volunteers with training, safety protocols, and mentorship.
Maintain open governance and donor reporting for accountability.

programs.heroCopy: Each program is built around community-led priorities, measurable outcomes, and transparent funding so donors can see meaningful progress.

programs.title: Youth Education Support
programs.description: Scholarships, after-school learning labs, mentorship, and digital skills training for young learners.

programs.title: Food Security Initiatives
programs.description: Community gardens, emergency food distributions, nutrition workshops, and sustainable farming guidance.

programs.title: Health & Wellness Outreach
programs.description: Mobile clinics, vaccination drives, mental health counseling, and wellness education across underserved regions.

programs.title: Women's Empowerment
programs.description: Business coaching, savings groups, and leadership programs that help women build confidence and independence.

showcases: Education centers offering evening tutoring and career mentoring.
Local gardens supplying fresh produce to schools and families.
Wellness teams providing free health screenings and counseling.
Entrepreneurship programs helping women launch small businesses.

gallery.heroTitle: Photos and documentaries showing our impact.
gallery.heroCopy: Browse images and short films that capture community progress, volunteer action, and donor-supported success stories.

blog.heroTitle: Insights, transparency, and the latest program news.
blog.heroCopy: Stay informed with stories from our field teams, donor reports, and project highlights that demonstrate accountability and progress.

posts.subtitle: Featured story
posts.title: Building Resilient Communities After Crisis
posts.summary: How our teams restored clean water access and stable food supply after flood season, bringing immediate relief and long-term resilience.

posts.subtitle: Program update
posts.title: Investing in Youth Mental Health
posts.summary: The new counseling program is improving academic outcomes and emotional wellbeing for young people across partner communities.

posts.subtitle: Transparency report
posts.title: Q1 2026 Financial Transparency Report
posts.summary: Our latest financial and program performance report, published for donors, partners, and community stakeholders.

volunteer.heroTitle: Join our volunteer community and make a meaningful difference.
volunteer.heroCopy: Register to support programs, events, outreach, and administrative coordination across our projects.

contact.heroTitle: Reach out for partnership, support, or media inquiries.
contact.heroCopy: We welcome donors, volunteers, partners, and journalists to connect with our team for thoughtful responses and collaboration.

donate.heroTitle: Support HeartFeel Foundation with trusted payment options.
donate.heroCopy: Choose Mobile Money, Visa/Mastercard, or PayPal and contribute to projects that deliver transparent, high-impact results.

assistance.title: Donation assistance
assistance.body: We accept multiple payment options to make giving easy and accessible. The form below is ready for integration with secure payment providers.
methods: Mobile Money for local and regional donors

why.title: Why donate?
why.body: Your gift supports community programs, financial transparency, and volunteer-led solutions with measurable outcomes.
